completions.label: shadcn-form-with-zod
shadcn-data-table

documentation.value:
Full DataTable component setup with column definitions and TanStack Table.

```tsx
const columns: ColumnDef<Payment>[] = [
  { accessorKey: "status", header: "Status" },
  { accessorKey: "amount", header: "Amount" },
];
```

completions.label: shadcn-date-picker
completions.detail: Date Picker with Calendar and Popover

documentation.value:
Date picker implemented with Calendar inside a Popover.

```tsx
<Popover>
  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Pick a date</Button>
  </PopoverTrigger>
  <PopoverContent>
    <Calendar mode="single" selected={date} onSelect={setDate} />
  </PopoverContent>
</Popover>
```

completions.insertText: const [${1:date}, ${2:setDate}] = React.useState();

completions.label: shadcn-command-palette

documentation.value:
Command palette using CommandDialog for keyboard-driven navigation.

```tsx
<CommandDialog open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <CommandInput placeholder="Type a command..." />
  <CommandList>
    <CommandGroup heading="Suggestions">
      <CommandItem>Calendar</CommandItem>
    </CommandGroup>
  </CommandList>
</CommandDialog>
```

completions.label: shadcn-toast-notification
shadcn-dialog-pattern
completions.detail: Dialog with header, content, and footer

documentation.value: Full dialog pattern with trigger, content, header, description, and footer.

completions.insertText:
${2:Title} ${3:Description}
${4:content}

documentation.value: Sheet side panel with trigger, header, content, and footer.
DropdownMenu with trigger, content, labels, items, and separators.

completions.label: shadcn-alert-dialog-pattern

documentation.value: AlertDialog for destructive or confirmation actions.

completions.insertText:
<AlertDialog>
	<AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
		<Button variant="destructive">${1:Delete}</Button>
	</AlertDialogTrigger>
	<AlertDialogContent>
		<AlertDialogHeader>
			<AlertDialogTitle>${2:Are you sure?}</AlertDialogTitle>
			<AlertDialogDescription>${3:This action cannot be undone.}</AlertDialogDescription>
		</AlertDialogHeader>
		<AlertDialogFooter>
			<AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
			<AlertDialogAction>${4:Continue}</AlertDialogAction>
		</AlertDialogFooter>
	</AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>

completions.label: shadcn-tabs-pattern
completions.detail: Tabs with tab list and content panels

documentation.value: Tabs component with TabsList, TabsTrigger, and TabsContent.

completions.insertText:
<Tabs defaultValue="${1:tab1}" className="w-[400px]">
	<TabsList>
		<TabsTrigger value="${1:tab1}">${2:Tab 1}</TabsTrigger>
		<TabsTrigger value="${3:tab2}">${4:Tab 2}</TabsTrigger>
	</TabsList>
	<TabsContent value="${1:tab1}">${5:Content 1}</TabsContent>
	<TabsContent value="${3:tab2}">${6:Content 2}</TabsContent>
</Tabs>

completions.insertText: import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";

documentation.value:
A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal content. Built on Radix UI Accordion primitive.

```tsx
<Accordion type="single" collapsible>
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger>Is it accessible?</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Yes.</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```
Individual item within an Accordion. Requires a unique `value` prop.
The clickable heading that toggles an AccordionItem open/closed.
The collapsible content area of an AccordionItem.

Displays a callout for important information.

```tsx
<Alert>
  <AlertTitle>Heads up!</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Description here.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```
Title element within an Alert component.
Description element within an Alert component.
A modal dialog that interrupts the user for important confirmations. Built on Radix UI AlertDialog.
Displays content within a desired ratio. Built on Radix UI AspectRatio. ```tsx ```

An image element with a fallback for representing the user. Built on Radix UI Avatar.

```tsx
<Avatar>
  <AvatarImage src="https://example.com/avatar.png" />
  <AvatarFallback>CN</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>
```
Displays a badge or label. Supports variants: default, secondary, outline, destructive.

A button component with multiple variants and sizes.

```tsx
<Button variant="default" size="default">Click me</Button>
<Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button>
<Button variant="outline" size="sm">Small</Button>
<Button variant="ghost" size="icon"><Icon /></Button>
```

A date picker calendar component. Built on react-day-picker.

```tsx
<Calendar mode="single" selected={date} onSelect={setDate} />
```

A card container with header, content, and footer sections.

```tsx
<Card>
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Description</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>Content</CardContent>
  <CardFooter>Footer</CardFooter>
</Card>
```
A carousel with motion and swipe built using Embla Carousel.
A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked. Built on Radix UI Checkbox.
An interactive component that expands/collapses content. Built on Radix UI Collapsible.

completions.label: Command

documentation.value: Fast, composable command menu. Built on cmdk.

completions.insertText:
<Command>
	<CommandInput placeholder="${1:Type a command...}" />
	<CommandList>
		<CommandEmpty>No results found.</CommandEmpty>
		<CommandGroup heading="${2:Group}">
			<CommandItem>${3:Item}</CommandItem>
		</CommandGroup>
	</CommandList>
</Command>

documentation.value: Displays a menu at the pointer's position upon right-click. Built on Radix UI ContextMenu.
A window overlaid on the primary window. Built on Radix UI Dialog.
A drawer component for mobile interfaces. Built on vaul.
Displays a menu to the user triggered by a button. Built on Radix UI DropdownMenu.
Form component built on react-hook-form with accessible form fields, labels, and validation messages.
Connects a form control to react-hook-form with automatic error handling.
For sighted users to preview content behind a link. Built on Radix UI HoverCard.

A styled input element.

```tsx
<Input type="email" placeholder="Email" />
```
Renders an accessible label associated with controls. Built on Radix UI Label.
A visually persistent menu common in desktop applications. Built on Radix UI Menubar.
A collection of links for navigation. Built on Radix UI NavigationMenu.
Pagination with page navigation, previous/next links.
Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button. Built on Radix UI Popover.
Displays an indicator showing completion progress. Built on Radix UI Progress.

completions.label: RadioGroup

documentation.value: A set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked at a time. Built on Radix UI RadioGroup.
Augments native scroll with custom styling. Built on Radix UI ScrollArea.
Displays a list of options for the user to pick from. Built on Radix UI Select.
Visually or semantically separates content. Built on Radix UI Separator.
Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main screen. Slides in from screen edge.
Used to show a placeholder while content is loading.
An input for selecting a value from a range. Built on Radix UI Slider.
A toggle control that switches between on and off. Built on Radix UI Switch.
A responsive table component with header, body, and caption support.
A set of layered sections of content. Built on Radix UI Tabs.
A styled textarea element for multi-line text input.
A succinct message displayed temporarily. Uses Radix UI Toast.

Renders toast notifications. Place in your root layout.

```tsx
<Toaster />
```
A two-state button that can be on or off. Built on Radix UI Toggle.
A group of toggle buttons. Built on Radix UI ToggleGroup.
A popup that displays information on hover/focus. Built on Radix UI Tooltip. Must be wrapped in TooltipProvider.
Powerful table built with TanStack Table for sorting, filtering, and pagination.
Date picker composed from Popover and Calendar components.

Pre-defined variant function for Button component. Use to apply button styles to non-button elements.

```tsx
<Link className={buttonVariants({ variant: "outline" })}>Link</Link>
```

Pre-defined variant function for Badge component. ```tsx
Custom badge
```

completions.label: useFormField

documentation.value: Returns the current form field context including error, id, name. Used internally by FormItem, FormLabel, FormMessage.

completions.insertText: const { error, formItemId, formDescriptionId, formMessageId } = useFormField();

documentation.value: Default variant prop for shadcn/ui components.
Destructive variant for alerts, buttons, badges, and toasts.
Outline variant — bordered with transparent background.
Secondary variant — muted background color.
Ghost variant — transparent background, visible on hover.
Link variant — styled as an underlined hyperlink.
Default size for buttons (h-10 px-4 py-2).
Small size variant (h-9 rounded-md px-3).
Large size variant (h-11 rounded-md px-8).
Icon size variant (h-10 w-10) — for icon-only buttons.

Merges props onto the child element instead of rendering a default element. Common Radix UI pattern.

```tsx
<DialogTrigger asChild>
  <Button>Open</Button>
</DialogTrigger>
```
className prop using cn() for conditional class merging.

shadcn/ui theme variable for the default background color.

```css
--background: 0 0% 100%; /* hsl */
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for the default foreground/text color.

```css
--foreground: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for the primary brand color.

```css
--primary: 222.2 47.4% 11.2%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for the secondary color.

```css
--secondary: 210 40% 96.1%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for muted backgrounds.

```css
--muted: 210 40% 96.1%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for accent highlights.

```css
--accent: 210 40% 96.1%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for destructive actions (red).

```css
--destructive: 0 84.2% 60.2%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for default border color.

```css
--border: 214.3 31.8% 91.4%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for input element borders.

```css
--input: 214.3 31.8% 91.4%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for focus ring outlines.

```css
--ring: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for default border radius.

```css
--radius: 0.5rem;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for card background color.

```css
--card: 0 0% 100%;
```

shadcn/ui theme variable for popover background color.

```css
--popover: 0 0% 100%;
```
